##RRUFFID=R130122
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Mn^2+^_14_(B_2_O_5_)_4_(OH)_8_·(Si,Mg)(O,OH)_4_Cl
##LOCALITY=Kombat mine, Namibia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Light brown prismatic to needles, associated with black hausmannite and white barite

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
